group.name: Stage Kit
group.description: The RockBand Stage Kit styled effects, rendering on a DMX light array: the same colours, step sequences and Large/Small venue branches, mapped onto a virtual 8-LED ring so chases keep their shape across 4 - 16+ light rigs, with live BPM. 8 is most common.

cues.name: Intro
cues.description: Solid green.

cues.name: Silhouettes
cues.description: Solid green.

cues.name: Flare Fast
cues.description: Blue wash; after a Cool cue it becomes cyan.

cues.name: Flare Slow
cues.description: Full white.

cues.name: Menu
cues.description: Blue single-LED chase around the ring, 8 steps over 2s (250 ms/step).

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue start
notes.note: Sets all lights to a dim blue, the cue-called steps a bright blue above this. This is an intentional deviation from YALCY's menu handling which turns all other non-stepping lights off.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Persistent blue CW chase: one bright LED steps the ring every 250 ms (wall-clock — 8 steps / 2 s, independent of BPM).

cues.name: Score
cues.description: Large: red opposite-pair chase (1s) plus a yellow pair chase (2s). Small: blue reverse single chase (1s) plus the yellow pair chase.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Branches on venue. Large: red opposite-pair chase (250 ms/step) + yellow pair chase (500 ms). Small: blue reverse single chase (125 ms) + the same yellow pairs.

cues.name: Warm Automatic
cues.description: Red opposite-pair chase (4-beat cycle) plus a reverse yellow single chase (8-beat cycle) on beat.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Two beat-synced chases: red opposite-pair CW (1 step/beat -> 4-beat cycle) and a reverse yellow single CCW (8-beat cycle).

cues.name: Warm Manual
cues.description: Red opposite-pair chase (4-keyframe cycle) plus a reverse yellow single chase (8-keyframe cycle) on keyframe.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Same red/yellow chases as Warm Automatic, but each step advances on a KEYFRAME instead of the beat (waitUntil "keyframe").

cues.name: Cool Automatic
cues.description: Blue opposite-pair chase (4-beat cycle) plus a reverse green single chase (8-beat cycle) on beat.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue start
notes.note: Builds the ring + opposite-pairs.

notes.label: Important
notes.title: Ring build
notes.note: Builds a virtual 8-step ring scaled to the rig: counts dividing 8 repeat (4 doubled, 8 one-to-one), multiples of 8 interleave (16 front/back), other counts resample to 8 steps . Every chase keeps its 8-step shape and timing on any sized rig.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Two beat-synced chases: blue opposite-pair CW (4-beat cycle) and a reverse green single CCW (8-beat cycle).

cues.name: Cool Manual
cues.description: Blue opposite-pair chase (4-beat cycle) plus a reverse green single chase (8-beat cycle) on keyframe.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Same blue/green chases as Cool Automatic, but each step advances on a KEYFRAME instead of the beat.

cues.name: Harmony
cues.description: Large: yellow forward and red reverse single chases on the beat. Small: green and blue forward single chases on the beat. Harmony.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Branches on venue (1 step/beat). Large: yellow forward + red reverse single chases. Small: green forward + blue forward single chases.

cues.name: Searchlights
cues.description: Yellow chase one way and a second chase the other way, a quarter beat per step (large: blue, small: red).

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: A yellow forward (CW) chase plus reverse (CCW) red/blue searchlights; venue-gated, with step time derived from live BPM.

cues.name: Sweep
cues.description: Large: red opposite-pair chase on the beat. Small: a yellow pair chase with a blue chase (two trailing dark steps) and a reverse green chase (four leading dark steps).

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Branches on venue. Large: red opposite-pair CW chase on the beat. Small: a yellow pair chase, a blue CW chase (2 trailing dark steps) and a reverse green chase (4 leading dark steps), all on the quarter-beat.

cues.name: Big Rock Ending
cues.description: Frantic full-rig colour cycle (red, green, yellow, blue) an eighth of a beat per step.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Full-rig colour cycle red -> green -> yellow -> blue, one step per eighth-beat (BPM-derived). Set on layer 0.

notes.label: Important
notes.title: Live BPM
notes.note: Each cue-called reads beat-duration-ms and divides it (a quarter-beat) into the per-step delay, so the sub-beat chases re-time to the current tempo within one cycle.

cues.name: Default
cues.description: Toggles a full blue wash and a full red wash on each keyframe. In small venues a yellow wash is added that blinks off for 200 ms on the red drum.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue start
notes.note: Loads the all-lights array (used by the small-venue yellow wash).

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called -> toggle
notes.note: Holds a full BLUE wash, then a full RED wash on layer 1, swapping on each keyframe. Cue-called re-raises the finished chain so it loops.

notes.label: Important
notes.title: Keyframe toggle
notes.note: Each colour is a BLOCKING set-color that waits on the keyframe event (so it advances on First/Next/Previous, not only Next). The chain loops via cue-called - that is what makes blue<->red alternate.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Small venue
notes.note: venue != Large raises a persistent YELLOW wash on layer 3 with REPLACE blend, so it reads solid yellow rather than blending to white over the blue/red.

notes.label: Important
notes.title: Red-drum blink
notes.note: On every red drum the yellow wash blinks off for 200 ms. The raiser is interruptible, so rapid red drums each restart the blink instead of being dropping it.

cues.name: Stomp
cues.description: Five groups toggle on and off with each keyframe: front q1 yellow, front q4 red, back q1 red, back q4 yellow, inner green. Records its on/off state in shared group state for Silhouettes Spotlight.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called -> toggle
notes.note: Publishes stompState=1, lights five groups together, then publishes stompState=0 and clears to black — one keyframe per state, looped via cue-called.

notes.label: Important
notes.title: 5-group parallel hold
notes.note: The five groups (front q1 yellow / q4 red, back q1 red / q4 yellow, inner green) are BLOCKING set-colors raised in PARALLEL from one node, so they all hold together until the next keyframe. A non-blocking set-color above layer 0 would be cleared before it showed.

notes.label: Important
notes.title: Shared state handoff
notes.note: stompState (cue-group scope) records the on/off look so Silhouettes Spotlight can reproduce it after Stomp.

cues.name: Dischord
cues.description: Yellow chase on the beat, a faster reverse green chase, an alternating blue pattern, and a red full flash on the red drum.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Three overlaid looks: a yellow CW chase on the beat, a faster reverse green CCW chase (quarter-beat), and an alternating blue pattern.

notes.label: Important
notes.title: Blue swaps on keyframe
notes.note: Blue uses the KEYFRAME variant of the alternating-pattern effect, so its two light sets swap on EVERY keyframe — not gated by the beat as the plain alternating pattern is.

notes.label: Important
notes.title: Red-drum flash
notes.note: A full-rig red flash fires on each red drum (~120 ms).

cues.name: Frenzy
cues.description: Large: full-rig cycle red / off / blue / yellow a quarter beat per step. Small: a busier red / green / blue cycle.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called
notes.note: Branches on venue; full-rig colour cycle, one step per quarter-beat. Large: red -> off -> blue -> yellow. Small: red -> green -> blue -> red.

cues.name: Silhouettes Spotlight
cues.description: Reacts to the previous cue: after Dischord, green wash with blue on odd lights that drops on a vocal note-off; after Intro, a blue flash on the red drum; after Stomp, reproduces Stomp's last look; otherwise dark.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue start
notes.note: Loads the all-lights and odd-LED light sets.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Cue called -> branch on previous cue
notes.note: Reads the previous cue and reproduces a matching look so the Stage Kit is not left dark during the transition.

notes.label: Important
notes.title: Previous-cue branch
notes.note: Branches on prevCue: after Dischord -> blue on the odd LEDs over a green wash. After Intro -> blue flash on the red drum. After Stomp -> reproduce Stomp's last look from the shared stompState. Else all off.

notes.label: Important
notes.title: Vocal-gated blue
notes.note: The Dischord branch toggles the odd-LED blue on each vocal note-off (held blue -> held black, looped via cue-called).

cues.name: Strobe Slow
cues.description: White strobe at a sixteenth-note rate.

cues.name: Strobe Medium
cues.description: White strobe at a 24th-note rate.

cues.name: Strobe Fast
cues.description: White strobe at a 32nd-note rate.

cues.name: Strobe Fastest
cues.description: White strobe at a 64th-note rate.
